narrative: Hopes for a US-Iran peace deal drive a sharp dollar sell-off as crude tumbles -6.59% and US yields retreat; gold surges +2.84% near $4,700 while equities firm +1.14%. USD/JPY falls to 156.45 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry bid softens on geopolitical de-escalation; DXY lower -0.44% and VIX at 17.2. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme (1.12% spread) as NZD outperformance (+0.59% avg) contrasts with CAD weakness. Watch RBNZ rate decision on May 27 for the next major policy catalyst.
